WhyChooseUs.label: Your Next Step
WhyChooseUs.manifesto: We're not just a place that offers courses and workshops... we're a true partner in the journey of every entrepreneur, idea owner, or anyone ambitious who wants to grow and succeed in the business world.
WhyChooseUs.subtitle: We speak to the NEXT GENERATION of professionals. We help you take your business to the NEXT LEVEL.
WhyChooseUs.service1Desc: We offer hands-on workshops that teach you how to immediately apply what you learn in marketing, sales, or management.
WhyChooseUs.service2Desc: If you have a business idea or a project to grow, our expert consultation sessions help you plan smart and scale faster.
WhyChooseUs.service3Desc: Join the Next community, exchange experiences, ideas, and find support from people who share your passion and ambition.
WhyChooseUs.service4Desc: We organize camps and live events that combine intense learning with real-world experience and networking.

About.heroTitle: We Build the Future — One Skill at a Time
About.heroSubtitle: Next Academy is the leading Arabic-first online learning platform for technology, programming, and digital skills.
About.storyTitle: From a Vision to a Movement
About.storyP1: Next Academy was founded with one belief: that world-class technology education should be accessible to everyone in the Arab world — regardless of location, language, or background.
About.storyP2: What started as a handful of online workshops in 2020 grew into a full-fledged platform offering immersive bootcamps, self-paced courses, and live mentoring sessions. Today, we partner with industry leaders to deliver practical, career-ready programs.
About.storyP3: Our graduates work at top companies across the MENA region and beyond. We don't just teach — we transform careers.
About.timeline1Desc: Launched our first online workshops with 120 students from across the Arab world.
About.timeline2Desc: Expanded to 15+ programs and signed our first industry partnership.
About.timeline3Desc: Launched the Next Academy platform with live mentoring and self-paced courses.
About.timeline4Desc: Reached 5,000 graduates and expanded into corporate training.
About.timeline5Desc: Partnered with international tech companies and launched AI-powered programs.
About.valuesSubtitle: Our guiding principles that shape everything we do.
About.value1Desc: We pursue the highest quality in everything we deliver — from curriculum design to student support.
About.value2Desc: We stay ahead of industry trends and constantly evolve our programs to match market demands.
About.value3Desc: We believe every learner deserves access to world-class education, regardless of background.
About.value4Desc: We measure success by the real career outcomes and transformations our students achieve.
About.teamSubtitle: A passionate team of educators, engineers, and designers building the future of Arabic tech education.
About.member1Bio: 15+ years in tech and education. Previously led engineering teams at regional tech companies.
About.member2Bio: Curriculum designer and educator specializing in project-based learning and bootcamp pedagogy.
About.member3Bio: Full-stack engineer passionate about building educational technology that scales across the MENA region.
About.ctaSubtitle: Browse our programs and find the right path for your career in tech.
